allow: PowerShell(if \($env:ANDROID_HOME\) { Write-Output "ANDROID_HOME=$env:ANDROID_HOME"; Get-ChildItem "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "ANDROID_HOME not set in this session" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk", "C:\\Android\\Sdk"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path "$c\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } else { Write-Output "not found: $c" } })
